Orji
Kingsley

Experienced in

SAAS Industry

Media Monitoring Industry

Fintech Industry

E-commerce Industry

And Health Care Industry

As a seasoned product designer with over 9 years of product experience, I’ve mastered the craft of driving successful UX design initiatives in cross-functional teams for digital products that have won the hearts of millions of users.

I specialize in partnering with product leads to develop the strategy and vision, and I (still) have a passion for being hands-on in helping teams deliver high-quality user interface solutions through a design process that covers research, prototyping, and iterations.

In my past roles, I have been responsible for managing design operation programs that have improved the collaboration between designers and product teams by optimizing processes, frameworks and design standards,

When I'm not working on projects, I enjoy helping designers with portfolio feedback & career growth advice. 

Skills

My core skills

Product design, UX and UI Design, User research, User Personas & Journeys, Usability testing, User centred design, Design thinking, Interaction design, Prototyping, Stakeholder management, Data visualisation, Product strategy, Product management.

  • Phone : +44 7404167963
  • E-mail: Designwithkingsley@yahoo.com

Tools & Projects

What I Use to create magic
Figma

I use Figma to design user interfaces collaboratively, create interactive prototypes, and streamline feedback from team members in real-time.

Adobe Photoshop

I use Adobe Photoshop to create and refine visual assets, enhance images, and design high-fidelity mockups for user interfaces.

Miro

I use Miro to create interactive whiteboards for brainstorming, mapping user journeys, and collaborating on design concepts in real-time.

Adobe After Effect

I use Adobe XD to design and prototype user interfaces, create interactive wireframes, and test user flows efficiently.

Jira

I use Jira to manage design projects, track progress, and collaborate with cross-functional teams effectively.

Sketch

I use Sketch to design and prototype user interfaces, create vector graphics, and develop reusable design element.

Bounty isn't your average dating app; it's a game-changer in the world of online romance! With a commitment to revolutionising your dating experience, Bounty brings instant connections.
View Case Study
Golearn is an online learning platform; with features like a personalized CRM for students and an intelligent AI system that aids their learning. Golearn is revolutionizing the way you experience education.
View Case Study
SwiftPay is a cutting-edge online banking application designed to provide users with a seamless and secure financial management experience.
View Case Study
The Pickme project aims to enhance the user experience (UX) across ride hailing industry, a leading ride-hailing app serving millions of users across various in Nigeria.
View Case Study
Pourout is a social news platform designed to facilitate the sharing and discussion of news stories among its users.
View Case Study
G GUARD is a game accessory app that provides users with a comprehensive suite of tools to enhance their gaming experience.
View Case Study

Experience

Working with
Present
Senior UX Designer :
Onclusive

I created interactive prototypes for user testing. Our main goal was to validate design concepts before development.

I achieved a unified design system by developing comprehensive component libraries and design guidelines.

I achieved actionable insights by conducting user interviews, surveys, and usability tests to carter for the third largest player in the $15 bn market ($8bn -media intelligence/PR, $7bn -social listening).

I redesigned the Onclusive 360 media monitoring platform which led to a 20% increase in conversion rate in USA, UK, Ireland, France, Italy, Spain, Germany, Singapore, and Australia with more than 15,000 clients worldwide.

2018-2022
Mid-level UX/UI Designer at Flutterwave

I worked on User Research focusing on understanding user needs and behaviours. The goal was to gather insights to inform design decisions.

I achieved seamless collaboration by facilitating design sprints and workshops.

I worked on iterative testing and feedback loops, leading to a 25% improvement in user satisfaction scores.

I created Information Architecture focusing on organizing content logically and intuitively. My main goal was to ensure users could easily find crypto information.

I worked on optimizing user journeys, which led to a 15% increase in design completion rates.

2016-2018
Junior UX Designer at Castlnet TechnOlOgies

I worked on prototype iterations, which led to a 15% reduction in post-launch revisions.

I also worked in the Accessibility department focusing on ensuring our products were usable by people with disabilities. Our main goal was to meet accessibility standards and improve inclusivity.

I worked on enhancing accessibility features, resulting in a 10% increase in accessibility compliance rates.

I worked in the Data Analytics department focusing on incorporating data insights into the design process. The main goal was to make informed design decisions.

Birmingham
